name: Open X-Embodiment
notes: 跨具身最大开源数据集，RT-X 训练必备。覆盖多种机器人形态，适合泛化学习研究。
description: Open X-Embodiment 是由 Google DeepMind 联合全球 34 家研究机构共同推出的跨具身机器人学习数据集。该数据集聚合了来自 22 种不同机器人形态的 60+ 个独立数据集，总计超过 100 万条真实机器人操作轨迹。所有数据基于 RLDS（Reinforcement Learning Datasets Standard）格式统一编码，涵盖视觉、本体状态和动作等多种模态。该数据集是训练 RT-1、RT-2、RT-X 等机器人基础模型的核心数据源，也是目前规模最大、最具影响力的开源机器人学习数据集之一。

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation / action / reward / discount

changelog.text: 首次发布，包含来自 22 种机器人形态的 60+ 数据集
RT-X 模型发布，数据集扩展至 100万+ 轨迹

name: BridgeData V2
notes: 小样本学习、模仿学习常用。数据质量高，任务多样。
description: BridgeData V2 是由 UC Berkeley RAIL 实验室发布的大规模机器人操作数据集，包含 85,000 条真实机器人操作轨迹。数据集通过低成本 WidowX 机械臂在多样化的桌面操作场景中采集，涵盖抓取、放置、推拉、叠放等基本操作技能。该数据集广泛应用于小样本模仿学习、扩散策略和机器人基础模型训练，数据质量高且任务多样性丰富，是当前最常用的操作学习数据集之一。

changelog.text: BridgeData V2 发布，包含 85K 操作轨迹

name: RH20T
notes: 高质量居家机器人视频数据集，适合日常任务学习。
description: RH20T 是由斯坦福大学和 Google 联合发布的高质量居家机器人视频数据集，包含 20,000 个 RGB-D 视频片段，覆盖 120+ 个日常任务。数据集在真实家庭环境中采集，涵盖清洁、整理、烹饪等多种日常场景。每段视频配有动作轨迹标注，适用于机器人模仿学习和视频预测研究。

name: RoboSet (MobRob)
notes: 适合策略学习、扩散模型研究。多视角数据便于3D理解。
description: 适合策略学习、扩散模型研究。多视角数据便于3D理解。 数据规模为 220K 演示轨迹。 覆盖 机械臂 等机器人类型。 适用于 操作, 装配 等任务场景。

name: Libero
notes: 长程任务 benchmark，适合指令跟随和任务规划研究。

name: UniACT
notes: Standardizes 6 open-source datasets (OXE, OXE-AugE, AgiBot-Beta, RoboCoin, RoboMind, Galaxea) into a unified delta-pose + rotation-vector action space with dual-arm padding. ⚠️ Do not confuse with Tsinghua UniAct (2025 framework) — UniACT is a dataset by AMAP CV Lab.
description: UniACT is a cross-embodiment robot manipulation dataset released by AMAP CV Lab (AutoNavi) alongside ABot-M0. It integrates and standardizes 6 major open-source datasets (Open X-Embodiment, OXE-AugE, AgiBot-Beta, RoboCoin, RoboMind, Galaxea), covering 20+ robot embodiments with 6M+ trajectories and 9,500+ hours of data. The key contribution is a unified action representation: all heterogeneous data is converted to end-effector delta pose + rotation vector, padded to a standard dual-arm format, enabling cross-embodiment VLA model pretraining. This dataset serves as the training foundation for the ABot-M0 model.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation → action (delta pose + rotation vector, dual-arm padded)

changelog.text: Initial release with ABot-M0: standardized integration of 6 source datasets

name: Galaxea Open-World Dataset (GOD)
notes: Unified hardware collection, real open-world scenes, fine-grained language annotations. 400K+ downloads in two months, one of the most-watched embodied AI datasets globally. Accompanied by G0 dual-system VLA model.
description: Galaxea Open-World Dataset (GOD) is a real-robot embodied AI dataset released by Galaxea on August 31, 2025. All data is collected from the self-developed R1 Lite mobile dual-arm robot (23 DoF), ensuring consistent action space and perception input across all trajectories. The dataset contains 500 hours of real-world manipulation data (>10TB), 100K+ trajectories, covering 150 task types across 50 real-world scenes (residential 50.8%, catering 33.2%, retail 8.7%, office 7.4%), 1600+ unique objects, and 58 manipulation skills (from fine-grained grasping to full-body coordination). Data is collected in non-lab environments with dynamic lighting, occlusions, and distractions, featuring sub-task-level natural language annotations supporting hierarchical robot learning (tabletop manipulation, few-shot, long-horizon mobile manipulation). Standardized in RLDS/LeRobot format with complete metadata; a small sample set is provided for quick testing. The accompanying open-source G0 dual-system VLA model (VLM multimodal planning + VLA fine-grained execution) has already supported external research projects including NVIDIA EgoScale and Ant Lingbot-VLA.

dataFormat.schema: episode → step → observation (RGB + depth + proprioception) / action (23-DoF) / language_instruction

changelog.text: Initial release: 500 hours of real-world manipulation data, 100K+ trajectories, with G0 model
Surpassed 400K downloads, becoming one of the most-watched embodied AI datasets globally

name: OXE-AugE
notes: Large-scale cross-embodiment augmentation of OXE. Cross-Painting renders real trajectories onto 9 virtual robots with visual + kinematic fidelity, designed for cross-embodiment generalization.
description: OXE-AugE (Open X-Embodiment Augmented Embodiments) is a large-scale derivative dataset released in late 2025 that augments Google's Open X-Embodiment (OXE) across multiple robot embodiments. The dataset selects 16 mainstream subsets from the original OXE (1M trajectories) and uses Cross-Painting + AugE-Toolkit to transfer and re-render trajectories from one robot onto others, ensuring kinematically valid and visually realistic results. Each original trajectory generates 8 cross-embodiment virtual trajectories + 1 original, totaling 4.4M+ trajectories across 9 robot embodiments: Franka, UR5, xArm, WidowX, Google Robot, Jaco, Sawyer, Kinova Gen3, and KUKA iiwa. In the original OXE, the top 4 robots account for 85% of trajectories; AugE enforces balanced distribution across all 9 embodiments, significantly improving diversity. Unified RLDS format with direct TFDS loading, sharing code and models (e.g., RT-1-X, Octo) with OXE. Experiments show policies trained on AugE achieve significantly better generalization to unseen robots than those trained on real data alone.

dataFormat.schema: OXE-compatible — episode → step → observation / action / reward / discount

changelog.text: Initial release: 4.4M+ trajectories, 9 robot embodiments, Cross-Painting augmentation

quality.annotation: 基于 OXE 原始标注
quality.realWorld: 真实数据增强（视觉+运动学保真）
